=== FILE: Tools.cs ===
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using System.Data;
using System.Globalization;
using System.IO;
using PSI.Sox.Interfaces;

namespace PSI.Sox
{
    public class Tools
    {
        public ILogger Logger { get; set; }

        public Tools(ILogger logger)
        {
            Logger = logger;
        }

        #region ShipExec Helper Methods
        /// <summary>
        /// Searches for non voided packages by the ShipperReference passing in the value to search for with
        /// a startDate currently defualted for -10 days from today unless you pass in a value and the endDate 
        /// that is set to todays date.
        /// First package match wins returns true
        /// Update the code to YOUR needs
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="shipperReference"></param>
        /// <returns>Reurns true that the package was found or false no data found</returns>
        public bool HasPackageShippedAlready(string shipperReference, IBusinessObjectApi BusinessObjectApi, ClientContext clientContext, int OptionalHowManyDaysFromToday = -10)
        { 
            try
            {
                var startDate = DateTime.Now.AddDays(OptionalHowManyDaysFromToday).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd");
                var endDate = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd");

                var searchCriteria = new Data.SearchCriteria
                {
                    Take = 1,

                    WhereClauses = new List<Data.WhereClause>
                    {
                        new Data.WhereClause { FieldName = "Shipdate", FieldValue = startDate, Operator = Data.SearchOperator.GreaterThanOrEqual },
                        new Data.WhereClause { FieldName = "Shipdate", FieldValue = endDate, Operator = Data.SearchOperator.LessThanOrEqual },
                        new Data.WhereClause { FieldName = "Voided", FieldValue = false, Operator = Data.SearchOperator.Equals },
                        new Data.WhereClause { FieldName = "ShipperReference", FieldValue = shipperReference, Operator = Data.SearchOperator.Equals }
                    },
                    OrderByClauses = new List<Data.OrderByClause>
                    {
                        new Data.OrderByClause { FieldName = "GlobalMsn", Direction = "desc" }
                    }
                };
                
                List<HistoryPackage> packages = BusinessObjectApi.SearchPackageHistory(clientContext.GetUserContext(), searchCriteria, out int totalRecords);

                if (packages.Count > 0)
                {
                    return true;
                }

                return false;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Logger.Log("Tools.HasPackageShippedAlready ", LogLevel.Error, ex.Message);
                Logger.Log("Tools.HasPackageShippedAlready ", LogLevel.Error, ex.StackTrace);
                throw new Exception(ex.Message);
            }
        }

        /// <summary> 
        /// Return the key from the value from the value that was lookup<BusinessRuleSetting>
        /// </summary> 
        /// <param name="soxDictionaryKey"></param> 
        /// <param name="soxDictionary"></param> 
        /// <returns>The key of the looked up value</returns> 
        public string GetStringKeyFromBusinessRuleSettings(string value, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings)
        {
            string returnValue = string.Empty;

            if (BusinessRuleSettings != null && BusinessRuleSettings.Any() && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(value))
            {
                int index = BusinessRuleSettings.FindIndex(i => i.Key == value);

                if (index > -1)
                {
                    returnValue = BusinessRuleSettings[index].Value;
                }

                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(returnValue))
                {
                    Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Warning, "In GetStringValueFromBusinessRuleSettings() Key " + value + " Value is Null or Empty");
                }
            }
            else
            {
                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Warning, "In GetStringValueFromBusinessRuleSettings() Key " + value + " was not found.");
            }

            return returnValue;
        }

        /// <summary> 
        /// Return a string value from List<BusinessRuleSetting> if the ey exists
        /// </summary> 
        /// <param name="soxDictionaryKey"></param> 
        /// <param name="soxDictionary"></param> 
        /// <returns>The value of the looked up key</returns> 
        public string GetStringValueFromBusinessRuleSettings(string key, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings)
        {
            string returnValue = string.Empty;

            if (BusinessRuleSettings != null && BusinessRuleSettings.Any() && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(key))
            {
                int index = BusinessRuleSettings.FindIndex(i => i.Key == key);

                if (index > -1)
                {
                    returnValue = BusinessRuleSettings[index].Value;
                }

                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(returnValue))
                {
                    Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Warning, "In GetStringValueFromBusinessRuleSettings() Key " + key + " Value is Null or Empty");
                }
            }
            else
            {
                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Warning, "In GetStringValueFromBusinessRuleSettings() Key " + key + " was not found.");
            }

            return returnValue;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Call this method from PRESHIP
        /// set paperless flag if shipping to a valid Country
        /// set it; rate it; check error; unflag if not vaild
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="shipmentRequest"></param>
        /// <param name="Params"></param>
        public void CheckAndSetPaperless(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, IBusinessObjectApi BusinessObjectApi, ClientContext clientContext, SerializableDictionary userParams)
        {
            if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country != "US")
            {
                shipmentRequest.Packages.ForEach(p => { p.CommercialInvoiceMethod = 1; });

                List<Service> service = new List<Service>();
                service.Add(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service);

                ShipmentResponse rateResponse = BusinessObjectApi.Rate(clientContext.GetUserContext(), shipmentRequest, service, 0, userParams).First();

                if (rateResponse.Packages[0].ErrorCode != 0)
                {
                    // UPS PAPERLESS ERROR
                    if (rateResponse.Packages[0].ErrorMessage.IndexOf("Commercial Invoice Method value is not supported", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0)
                    {
                        shipmentRequest.Packages.ForEach(p =>
                        {
                            p.CommercialInvoiceMethod = 0;
                        });
                    }

                    // DHL PAPERLESS ERROR
                    if (rateResponse.Packages[0].ErrorMessage.IndexOf("Commercial Invoice Method is not supported", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0)
                    {
                        shipmentRequest.Packages.ForEach(p =>
                        {
                            p.CommercialInvoiceMethod = 0;
                        });
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Call this method from POSTSHIP
        /// Remove the Commerical Invoice if paperless is enabled
        /// This will allow the CID to be able to be printed from History
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="document"></param>
        /// <param name="package"></param>
        public ShipmentResponse SuppressPrintingCommericalInvoice(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, ShipmentResponse shipmentResponse)
        {
            if (shipmentResponse.PackageDefaults.ErrorCode == 0)
            {
                if (shipmentRequest.Packages[0].CommercialInvoiceMethod == 1)
                {
                    for (int i = 0; i < shipmentResponse.Packages.Count; i++)
                    {
                        var cidStandardIndx = shipmentResponse.Packages[i].Documents.FindIndex(x => x.DocumentSymbol == "TANDATA_COMMERCIAL_INVOICE.STANDARD");

                        if (cidStandardIndx >= 0)
                        {
                            var labelDoc = shipmentResponse.Packages[i].Documents[cidStandardIndx];
                            shipmentResponse.Packages[i].Documents.RemoveAt(cidStandardIndx);
                        }

                        var cidStandardIndx1 = shipmentResponse.Packages[i].Documents.FindIndex(x => x.DocumentSymbol == "TANDATA_COMMERCIAL_INVOICE.STANDARD_1");

                        if (cidStandardIndx1 >= 0)
                        {
                            var labelDoc = shipmentResponse.Packages[i].Documents[cidStandardIndx1];
                            shipmentResponse.Packages[i].Documents.RemoveAt(cidStandardIndx1);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            return shipmentResponse;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Deletes batch records 
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="BusinessObjectApi"></param>
        /// <param name="clientContext"></param>
        /// <param name="BusinessRuleSettings"></param>
        public void CleanUpBatchRecords(IBusinessObjectApi BusinessObjectApi, ClientContext clientContext, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings)
        {
            // Get from the Business rules settings how many days to keep for batching this will return null if the key has not been created
            var howManyDaysToKeep = BusinessRuleSettings.Where(i => i.Key == "KeepHowManyDaysForBatch").Select(i => i.Value).FirstOrDefault();

            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(howManyDaysToKeep))
            {
                if (IsNumeric(howManyDaysToKeep))
                {
                    // End of Day Batch Data Clean Up Batch Reference format Example: cle5cap_20200130230635_filename
                    List<Batch> batchesReadyToDelete = BusinessObjectApi.GetBatches(clientContext.GetUserContext(), new Data.SearchCriteria(), out int totalRecords)
                            .Where(x => DateTime.ParseExact(x.BatchReference.Split('_')[1].ToString(), "yyyyMMddHHmmss", null) < DateTime.Now.AddDays(-Convert.ToInt32(howManyDaysToKeep))).ToList();

                    batchesReadyToDelete.ForEach(x => BusinessObjectApi.RemoveBatch(clientContext.GetUserContext(), x.BatchReference));
                }
                else
                {
                    Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, "Could not delete any bacthes. Please check to make sure that the KEY called KeepHowManyDaysForBatch has been set up in Management Studio and the VALUE is numeric.");
                }
            }
            else
            {
                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, "Could not delete any bacthes. Please check to make sure that the KEY called KeepHowManyDaysForBatch has been set up in Management Studio.");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Checks DHL carrier to NOT be able to ship to a US location from a US location
        /// This should be use on the PRESHIP as if you use it on the load the Country COULD be NULL
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="shipmentRequest"></param>
        public void CheckDHLShipments(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, List<Shipper> shippers)
        {
            // Check the ship to country to the ship from country for DHL and don't allow US to US
            if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Carrier.Contains("DHL") &&
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country == "US" ||
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country == "CA")
            {
                var shipperCheck = shippers.Find(i => i.Name == shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipper);

                if (shipperCheck.Country == "US" &&
                        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country == "US")
                {
                    throw new Exception("ERROR... DHL does not support shipping from " + shipperCheck.Country + " to " + shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country);
                }

                if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country == "CA" &&
                    shipperCheck.Country == "CA")
                {
                    throw new Exception("ERROR... DHL does not support shipping from " + shipperCheck.Country + " to " + shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country);
                }
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Call this method from the PRINT event
        /// Suppress printing Haz Mat document
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="document"></param>
        /// <param name="package"></param>
        /// <returns>if hazmat document found returns null a document</returns>
        public DocumentRequest SuppressPrintingHazMatDocument(DocumentRequest document, Package package)
        {
            if ((package != null) && (package.Hazmat == false) && document.DocumentMapping.Document.Symbol.Contains("HAZMAT"))
            {
                document = null;
            }

            return document;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Get value from the user’s custom data key/value
        /// </summary>
        /// <returns>Value if the key was found for the users custom data</returns>
        private string GetValueFromUsersCustomData(IBusinessObjectApi BusinessObjectApi, ClientContext clientContext, string key)
        {
            UserInfo userInfo = clientContext.User;

            string value = string.Empty;

            // PLEASE NOTE:            
            // Get the cost center code from the User Address Custom Data that MUST be set up in Management Studio user the user data
            ClientProfile usersProfile = BusinessObjectApi.GetClientProfile(clientContext.GetUserContext());

            if (usersProfile.UserInformation.Address != null)
            {
                if (usersProfile.UserInformation.Address.CustomData.Count > 0)
                {
                    int index = usersProfile.UserInformation.Address.CustomData.FindIndex(i => i.Key == key);

                    if (index > -1)
                    {
                        value = usersProfile.UserInformation.Address.CustomData[index].Value;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        return "ERROR... Could not find Key " + key + " set up for  your user";
                    }

                    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(value))
                    {
                        return value;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, "ERROR... Your Key/Value is NOT set up for your user. " + userInfo.UserName);
                        return "Your Key/Value is NOT set up for your user.";
                    }
                }
                else
                {
                    Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, "Your Key/Value is NOT set up for your user. " + userInfo.UserName);
                }
            }
            else
            {
                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, "Your Key/Value is NOT set up for your user. " + userInfo.UserName);
            }

            return "Your Key/Value is NOT set up for your user.";
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Returns carrier symbol from the service symbol
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="serviceSymbol"></param>
        /// <returns>ConnectShip Carrier Symbol</returns>
        public string GetCarrierSymbolFromServiceSymbol(string serviceSymbol)
        {
            return (string)serviceSymbol.Substring(0, serviceSymbol.IndexOf(".", serviceSymbol.IndexOf(".") + 1));
        }
        #endregion ShipExec Helper Methods

        #region ShipExec Data validation checks
        /// <summary>
        /// Check dims nnn.nnXnnn.nnXnnn.nn
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="text"></param>
        /// <returns>true or false</returns>
        public bool IsDimensionsFormatCorrect(string text)
        {
            return Regex.IsMatch(text, "(?!^0*$)(?!^0*\\.0*$)^\\d{1,3}(\\.\\d{1,2})?([x])\\d{1,3}(\\.\\d{1,2})?([x])\\d{1,3}(\\.\\d{1,2})?$", RegexOptions.None, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100));
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Check address 1, 2, AND 3 fields for Po Box FIRST ONE WINS
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="consignee"></param>
        /// <returns>true or false if PO Box found in address 1, 2 or 3</returns>
        public bool IsPoBoxFound(NameAddress consignee)
        {
            bool isPoBoxAddr1OrAddr2OrAddr3 = false;

            try
            {
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(consignee.Address1))
                {
                    if (Regex.IsMatch(consignee.Address1, @"(?i)\bp(?:[o0]st(al)?)?\.?([\-]?|\s*)?[o0]?(?:ffice)?\.?\s*b(?:[o0]x)?\.?(\s+[#\-]?(\d+))?\b", RegexOptions.IgnoreCase, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)))
                    {
                        return true;
                    }
                }

                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(consignee.Address2))
                {
                    if (Regex.IsMatch(consignee.Address1, @"(?i)\bp(?:[o0]st(al)?)?\.?([\-]?|\s*)?[o0]?(?:ffice)?\.?\s*b(?:[o0]x)?\.?(\s+[#\-]?(\d+))?\b", RegexOptions.IgnoreCase, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)))
                    {
                        return true;
                    }
                }

                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(consignee.Address3))
                {
                    if (Regex.IsMatch(consignee.Address1, @"(?i)\bp(?:[o0]st(al)?)?\.?([\-]?|\s*)?[o0]?(?:ffice)?\.?\s*b(?:[o0]x)?\.?(\s+[#\-]?(\d+))?\b", RegexOptions.IgnoreCase, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)))
                    {
                        return true;
                    }
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, "Exception in IsPoBoxFound " + ex.Message);
            }

            return isPoBoxAddr1OrAddr2OrAddr3;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// regx to check if phone number is vaild in USA
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="phone"></param>
        /// <returns>true or false</returns>
        public bool IsValidUSPhone(string phone)
        {
            Match isValidPhoneNumber = Regex.Match(phone, @"^(?:(?:\+?1\s*(?:[.-]\s*)?)?(?:\(\s*([2-9]1[02-9]|[2-9][02-8]1|[2-9][02-8][02-9])\s*\)|([2-9]1[02-9]|[2-9][02-8]1|[2-9][02-8][02-9]))\s*(?:[.-]\s*)?)?([2-9]1[02-9]|[2-9][02-9]1|[2-9][02-9]{2})\s*(?:[.-]\s*)?([0-9]{4})(?:\s*(?:#|x\.?|ext\.?|extension)\s*(\d+))?$", RegexOptions.None, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100));

            if (isValidPhoneNumber.Success)
            {
                return true;
            }

            return false;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Returns a bool value for various string combinations.  Will return a false
        /// if no match is found.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="value"></param>
        /// <returns>true or false</returns>
        public bool ConvertToBool(string value)
        {
            bool returnValue;

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(value))
            {
                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, "ConvertToBool() Key Value is NULL setting returnValue to FALSE");
                returnValue = false;
            }
            else
            {
                switch (value.ToUpper())
                {
                    case "NO":
                    case "N":
                    case "-1":
                    case "F":
                    case "FALSE":
                    case "0":
                        returnValue = false;
                        break;
                    case "YES":
                    case "Y":
                    case "T":
                    case "TRUE":
                    case "1":
                        returnValue = true;
                        break;
                    default:
                        returnValue = false;

                        Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, "ConvertToBool() Key Value did not translate {0} setting returnValue to FALSE " + value);
                        break;
                }
            }

            return returnValue;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Removes Nulls from the value object passed into the method
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="value"></param>
        /// <returns>string</returns>
        public string RemoveNullsReturnEmptyString(object value)
        {
            if (value == null)
            {
                value = string.Empty;
            }
            else if (string.IsNullOrEmpty((string)value))
            {
                value = string.Empty;
            }

            return value.ToString().Trim();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// checks to see if the format of the email addr is valid
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="emailAddress"></param>
        /// <returns>true or false if the email is in a vaild format</returns>
        public bool IsEmailFormatValid(string emailAddress)
        {
            Regex regex = new Regex(@"^([\w\.\-]+)@([\w\-]+)((\.(\w){2,3})+)$", RegexOptions.None, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100));
            Match match = regex.Match(emailAddress);
            if (match.Success)
            {
                return true;
            }
            else
            {
                return false;
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// removes special characters "<[^>]+/\'.{}()#$*@!:;?>._" in a string
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="stringToClean"></param>
        /// <returns>clean string removes <[^>]+/\'.{}()#$*@!:;?>._</returns>
        public string RemoveSpecialCharacters(string stringToClean)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(stringToClean))
            {
                stringToClean = string.Empty;
            }

            return Regex.Replace(stringToClean, "[^a-zA-Z0-9]+", " ", RegexOptions.Compiled, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100));
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// convert a sring at long
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="value"></param>
        /// <returns></returns>
        public long ConvertStringToLong(string value)
        {
            var parsed = long.TryParse(value,
                            NumberStyles.Number,
                            CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.NumberFormat,
                            out long returnValue);

            Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, "ConverStringToLong String= " + value + " returnValue = " + returnValue);

            return returnValue;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// try to covert a string value to decimal
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="value"></param>
        /// <returns></returns>
        public double ConvertStringToDouble(string value)
        {
            var parsed = double.TryParse(value,
                            NumberStyles.Number,
                            CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.NumberFormat,
                            out double returnValue);

            return returnValue;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// try to covert a string value to decimal
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="value"></param>
        /// <returns></returns>
        public decimal ConvertStringToDecimal(string value)
        {
            var parsed = decimal.TryParse(value,
                            NumberStyles.Number,
                            CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.NumberFormat,
                            out decimal returnValue);

            return returnValue;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Checks for valid patterns for the type passed in
        /// email,ip,canadianpostal,uspostal,url,usphone,intphone
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="data"></param>
        /// <param name="type">email, ip, canadianpostal, uspostal, url, usphone, intphone</param>
        /// <returns>true or false</returns>
        public bool RegExTester(string data, string type)
        {
            bool success = false;

            string pattern = string.Empty;

            switch (type)
            {
                case "email":
                    pattern = @"^(?("")("".+?(?<!\\)""@)|(([0-9a-z]((\.(?!\.))|[-!#\$%&'\*\+/=\?\^`\{\}\|~\w])*)(?<=[0-9a-z])@))(?(\[)(\[(\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}\])|(([0-9a-z][-\w]*[0-9a-z]*\.)+[a-z0-9][\-a-z0-9]{0,22}[a-z0-9]))$";
                    break;
                case "ip":
                    pattern = "\\b(25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\\.(25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\\b";
                    break;
                case "canadianpostal":
                    pattern = "^[ABCEGHJKLMNPRSTVXY]\\d[ABCEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVYXYZ][ ]?\\d[ABCEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ]\\d$";
                    break;
                case "uspostal":
                    pattern = @"^(\d{5}-\d{4}|\d{5}|\d{9})$";
                    break;
                case "url":
                    pattern = @"(https?|HTTPS?)://[a-zA-Z0-9/_\-\$\+\(\)\.\'\,\!\*]*";
                    break;
                case "usphone":
                    pattern = "^(?<Toll>[1])?\\-?\\s?\\(?(?<AreaCode>\\d{3})\\)?\\s*\\-?(?<Ext>\\d{3})\\-?\\s?(?<Number>\\d{4})(?x)";
                    break;
                case "intphone":
                    pattern = @"\+(9[976]\d|8[987530]\d|6[987]\d|5[90]\d|42\d|3[875]\d|2[98654321]\d|9[8543210]|8[6421]|6[6543210]|5[87654321]|4[987654310]|3[9643210]|2[70]|7|1)\d{1,14}$";
                    break;
            }

            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(pattern))
            {
                Regex regEx = new Regex(pattern, RegexOptions.None, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100));
                Match match = regEx.Match(data);

                if (match.Success)
                {
                    success = true;
                }
            }

            return success;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Checks if string value is numeric
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="text"></param>
        /// <returns>true or false</returns>
        public bool IsNumeric(string text)
        {
            return Regex.IsMatch(text, "^\\d+$", RegexOptions.None, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100));
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Check to see if the Path is a UNC path
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="path"></param>
        /// <returns>true or false</returns>
        public bool IsUnc(string path)
        {
            string root = Path.GetPathRoot(path);

            // Check if root starts with "\\"
            if (root.StartsWith(@"\\"))
                return true;

            // Check if the drive is a network drive
            DriveInfo drive = new DriveInfo(root);
            if (drive.DriveType == DriveType.Network)
                return true;

            return false;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Formats a string path with an ending backslash
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="str">The string object to extend</param>
        /// <returns>A string with a formated path ending in a backslash</returns>
        public string FormatPath(string str)
        {
            if (str.Trim().EndsWith(@"\"))
            {
                return str.Trim();
            }
            else
            {
                return str.Trim() + @"\";
            }
        }
        #endregion ShipExec Data validation checks

        #region ShipExec Objects
        /// <summary>
        /// Converts amount to a double and defualts currency to USD if nothing is passed
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="amount"></param>
        /// <param name="currency"></param>
        /// <returns>Money Object</returns>
        public Money ConvertToMoneyObj(string amount, string currency = "USD")
        {
            var parsed = double.TryParse(amount,
                    NumberStyles.Number,
                    CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.NumberFormat,
                    out double value);

            Money money = new Money
            {
                Amount = value,
                Currency = currency
            };

            return money;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Converts amount to a double and defualts Units to LB if nothing is passed
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="amount"></param>
        /// <param name="units"></param>
        /// <returns>Weight Object</returns>
        public Weight ConvertToWeightObj(string amount, string units = "LB")
        {
            var parsed = double.TryParse(amount,
                    NumberStyles.Number,
                    CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.NumberFormat,
                    out double value);

            Weight weight = new Weight
            {
                Amount = value,
                Units = units
            };

            return weight;
        }
        #endregion ShipExec objects

        #region ShipExec Translation Helper
        /// <summary>
        /// translate unit of measure
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="unitOfMeasure"></param>
        /// <returns></returns>
        public string TranslateUnitOfMeasure(string unitOfMeasure)
        {
            switch (unitOfMeasure.ToUpper())
            {
                case "EA":
                    return "PCS";

                default:
                    throw new Exception("Unable to match the commodity Unit Of Measure.");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Translate service types
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="serviceType"></param>
        /// <param name="countrySymbol"></param>
        /// <returns>ConnectShip service type symbol</returns>
        public Service TranslateServiceType(string serviceType)
        {
            Service service = new Service();

            switch (serviceType.ToUpper())
            {
                case "UPS Next Day Air Early A.M.":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.NAM";
                    break;
                case "UPS Next Day Air":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.NDA";
                    break;
                case "UPS Next Day Air Saver":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.NDS";
                    break;
                case "UPS 2nd Day Air A.M.":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.2AM";
                    break;
                case "UPS 2nd Day Air":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.2DA";
                    break;
                case "UPS 3 Day Select":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.3DA";
                    break;
                case "Ground":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.GND";
                    break;
                case "UPS Standard to Canada":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.:STD";
                    break;
                case "UPS Worldwide Express":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.EXP";
                    break;
                case "UPS Worldwide Saver":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.EXPSVR";
                    break;
                case "UPS Worldwide Expedited":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.EPD";
                    break;
                case "UPS Worldwide Express Plus":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.EXPPLS";
                    break;
                default:
                    // if no match what service do you want to default to?
                    // or do you want to throw an exception?
                    // service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.GND";
                    break;
            }

            return service;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// sets the billing terms
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="terms"></param>
        /// <param name="countrySymbol"></param>
        public string TranslateTerms(string terms, string countrySymbol)
        {
            // code your terms logic, Prepaid, Freight Collect, Third Party, ect...

            if (countrySymbol != "PUERTO_RICO" && countrySymbol != "UNITED_STATES")
            {
                terms = "DDU";
            }
            else
            {
                terms = "SHIPPER";
            }

            return terms;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Returns a ConnectShip country_symbol
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="country"></param>
        /// <returns>string</returns>
        public string GetCountrySymbol(string country, List<Country> profileCountries)
        {
            string returnCountry = "UNITED_STATES";

            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(country))
            {
                switch (country.ToUpper())
                {
                    case "US":
                    case "USA":
                        returnCountry = "UNITED_STATES";
                        break;

                    case "MX":
                    case "MEX":
                        returnCountry = "MEXICO";
                        break;

                    case "CA":
                    case "CAN":
                        returnCountry = "CANADA";
                        break;

                    default:
                        if (country.Length == 2)
                        {
                            returnCountry = profileCountries.Select(x => x.Iso2).FirstOrDefault();
                        }
                        else if (country.Length == 3)
                        {
                            returnCountry = profileCountries.Select(x => x.Iso3).FirstOrDefault();
                        }
                        break;
                }
            }

            return returnCountry;
        }
        #endregion ShipExec Translation Helper

        #region DataBase Helpers
        /// <summary>
        /// pass in a data table 
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="dt"></param>
        /// <returns>Data table columns and values</returns>
        public string GetDataTableColumnsAndValues(DataTable dt)
        {
            string fieldnames = string.Empty;

            foreach (DataRow row in dt.Rows)
            {
                foreach (DataColumn column in dt.Columns)
                {
                    fieldnames = fieldnames + column.ColumnName + ": " + row[column].ToString() + Environment.NewLine;
                }

                fieldnames = fieldnames + Environment.NewLine;
            }

            return fieldnames;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Check db row value for null
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="value"></param>
        /// <returns>The value as a string or could be blank</returns>
        public string IsDbValueNull(object value)
        {
            if (value == DBNull.Value)
            {
                return string.Empty;
            }
            else
            {
                return value.ToString();
            }
        }
        #endregion DataBase Helpers

        #region Misc Helpers
        /// <summary>
        /// Split the File by a delimiter and set to Commodity Contents
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="csvLine"></param>
        /// <returns>Commodity Content Object</returns>
        public CommodityContent FromCsv(string csvLine)
        {
            string[] values = csvLine.Split(',');

            CommodityContent content = new CommodityContent
            {
                ProductCode = values[0].Trim(),
                Description = values[1].Trim(),
                OriginCountry = values[2].Trim(),
                Quantity = Convert.ToInt64(values[3].Trim()),
                QuantityUnitMeasure = values[4].Trim(),

                UnitValue = new Money
                {
                    Amount = Convert.ToDouble(values[5].Trim()),
                    Currency = "USD"
                },

                UnitWeight = new Weight
                {
                    Amount = Convert.ToDouble(values[5].Trim()),
                    Units = "LB"
                }
            };

            return content;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Delete files from a directory
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="localFilePath"></param>
        /// <param name="keepHowManyDays"></param>
        public void CleanUpFiles(string localFilePath, int keepHowManyDays)
        {
            Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, "Starting to clean up old files.");

            try
            {
                Directory.GetFiles(localFilePath)
                         .Select(f => new FileInfo(f))
                         .Where(f => f.CreationTime < DateTime.Now.AddDays(-keepHowManyDays))
                         .ToList()
                         .ForEach(f => f.Delete());

                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, "Clean up completed for directory " + localFilePath + " keeping " + keepHowManyDays + " days.");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, "ERROR... In CleanUpFiles for directory " + localFilePath + " Keep how many days " + keepHowManyDays);
                throw new Exception("Error... could not delete the files from directory " + localFilePath + " " + ex.InnerException);
            }
        }
        #endregion Misc Helpers

        #region Custom Methods for this class only

        #endregion

System.Text.RegularExpressions;\nusing System.Globalization;\nusing PSI.Sox;\nusing PSI.Sox.Interfaces;\nusing PSI.Sox.Configuration;\nusing PSI.Sox.Data;\nusing PSI.Sox.Licensing;\nusing PSI.Sox.ML;\nusing PSI.Sox.Print;\nusing PSI.Sox.Resources;\nusing PSI.Sox.Wcf;\n\npublic class BiologicalReturnsShipmentManager\n{\n    private readonly ILogger _logger;\n    private readonly IBusinessObjectApi _businessObjectApi;\n    private readonly List<BusinessRuleSetting> _businessRuleSettings;\n    private readonly IProfile _profile;\n    private readonly ClientContext _clientContext;\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Creates a new manager instance for the biological returns shipping workflow.\n    /// </summary>\n    public BiologicalReturnsShipmentManager(ILogger logger, IBusinessObjectApi businessObjectApi, List<BusinessRuleSetting> businessRuleSettings, IProfile profile, ClientContext clientContext)\n    {\n        _logger = logger;\n        _businessObjectApi = businessObjectApi;\n        _businessRuleSettings = businessRuleSettings;\n        _profile = profile;\n        _clientContext = clientContext;\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Applies the blueprint's authoritative shipping rules before ShipExec calls the carrier.\n    /// </summary>\n    public void PreShip(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n    {\n        if (shipmentRequest == null)\n            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(shipmentRequest));\n\n        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults == null)\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults = new ShipmentPackageDefaults();\n\n        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee == null)\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee = new NameAddress();\n\n        if (shipmentRequest.Packages == null || shipmentRequest.Packages.Count == 0)\n            return;\n\n        var package = shipmentRequest.Packages[0];\n        string temperature = GetPackageString(package, \"ConsigneeReference\");\n        string miscReference3 = GetPackageString(package, \"MiscReference3\");\n        string miscReference4 = GetPackageString(package, \"MiscReference4\");\n\n        string shipperCountry = GetCountry(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ShipperAddress);\n        string consigneeCountry = GetCountry(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee);\n        bool isDomesticUS = IsUsCountry(shipperCountry) && IsUsCountry(consigneeCountry);\n        bool isCanadaToCanada = IsCanadaCountry(shipperCountry) && IsCanadaCountry(consigneeCountry);\n        bool isInternationalReturn = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipperCountry) && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(consigneeCountry) && !string.Equals(shipperCountry, consigneeCountry, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n        bool isCrossBorderOrInternational = isInternationalReturn || isCanadaToCanada || (!IsUsCountry(shipperCountry) && !IsUsCountry(consigneeCountry));\n\n        if (isInternationalReturn)\n        {\n            SetIntegerProperty(package, \"CommercialInvoiceMethod\", 1);\n            SetStringProperty(package, \"ExportReason\", \"Medical\");\n        }\n\n        bool biologicalSample = ParseBoolean(miscReference4, true);\n        EnsureServicePreference(shipmentRequest, \"CS Adapter\");\n\n        if (isDomesticUS)\n        {\n            if (!IsServiceValidForLane(shipmentRequest, \"NDA Early AM\"))\n            {\n                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = \"NDA\";\n                SetBooleanProperty(package, \"SaturdayDelivery\", false);\n            }\n        }\n        else if (isCrossBorderOrInternational)\n        {\n            if (!IsServiceValidForLane(shipmentRequest, \"UPS Express\"))\n            {\n                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = \"UPS Saver\";\n                SetBooleanProperty(package, \"SaturdayDelivery\", false);\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (biologicalSample)\n        {\n            SetStringProperty(package, \"PackageExtra_RESTRICTED_ARTICLE_TYPE\", \"32\");\n        }\n\n        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(miscReference3))\n        {\n            decimal dryIceKg = ParseDecimal(miscReference3, 0m);\n            decimal dryIceLbs = ConvertKgToLbs(dryIceKg);\n\n            SetDecimalProperty(package, \"DryIceWeight\", dryIceLbs);\n            SetStringProperty(package, \"DryIcePurpose\", \"Medical\");\n            SetStringProperty(package, \"DryIceRegulationSet\", isDomesticUS\n                ? \"International Air Transportation Association regulations.\"\n                : \"US 49 CFR regulations.\");\n\n            decimal currentWeight = GetDecimalProperty(package, \"WeightAmount\");\n            SetDecimalProperty(package, \"WeightAmount\", currentWeight + dryIceLbs);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Backup path for pickup association when the client-side Pickup Request + Save path fails.\n    /// </summary>\n    public ShipmentResponse Ship(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, Pickup pickup, bool shipWithoutTransaction, bool print, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n    {\n        if (!IsPickupFallbackEnabled())\n            return null;\n\n        if (shipmentRequest == null)\n            return null;\n\n        if (pickup != null)\n            return null;\n\n        Pickup fallbackPickup = BuildFallbackPickup(shipmentRequest, userParams);\n        if (fallbackPickup == null)\n            return null;\n\n        AttachPickupToShipmentRequest(shipmentRequest, fallbackPickup);\n        return null;\n    }\n\n    private string GetPackageString(PackageRequest package, string propertyName)\n    {\n        if (package == null)\n            return null;\n\n        var prop = package.GetType().GetProperty(propertyName);\n        if (prop == null)\n            return null;\n\n        object value = prop.GetValue(package);\n        return value?.ToString();\n    }\n\n    private string GetCountry(NameAddress address)\n    {\n        if (address == null)\n            return null;\n\n        return address.Country;\n    }\n\n    private bool IsUsCountry(string country)\n    {\n        return string.Equals(country, \"US\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||\n               string.Equals(country, \"USA\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||\n               string.Equals(country, \"United States\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n    }\n\n    private bool IsCanadaCountry(string country)\n    {\n        return string.Equals(country, \"CA\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||\n               string.Equals(country, \"Canada\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n    }\n\n    private bool ParseBoolean(string value, bool defaultValue)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))\n            return defaultValue;\n\n        if (bool.TryParse(value, out bool parsed))\n            return parsed;\n\n        return defaultValue;\n    }\n\n    private decimal ParseDecimal(string value, decimal defaultValue)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))\n            return defaultValue;\n\n        if (decimal.TryParse(value, out decimal parsed))\n            return parsed;\n\n        return defaultValue;\n    }\n\n    private decimal ConvertKgToLbs(decimal kg)\n    {\n        return kg * 2.2046226218m;\n    }\n\n    private void EnsureServicePreference(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, string serviceName)\n    {\n        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults == null)\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults = new ShipmentPackageDefaults();\n\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service))\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = serviceName;\n    }\n\n    private bool IsServiceValidForLane(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, string serviceName)\n    {\n        return shipmentRequest?.PackageDefaults?.Service == serviceName;\n    }\n\n    private void SetStringProperty(object target, string propertyName, string value)\n    {\n        if (target == null)\n            return;\n\n        var prop = target.GetType().GetProperty(propertyName);\n        if (prop == null || !prop.CanWrite)\n            return;\n\n        if (prop.PropertyType == typeof(string))\n            prop.SetValue(target, value);\n    }\n\n    private void SetIntegerProperty(object target, string propertyName, int value)\n    {\n        if (target == null)\n            return;\n\n        var prop = target.GetType().GetProperty(propertyName);\n        if (prop == null || !prop.CanWrite)\n            return;\n\n        if (prop.PropertyType == typeof(int) || prop.PropertyType == typeof(int?))\n            prop.SetValue(target, value);\n    }\n\n    private void SetDecimalProperty(object target, string propertyName, decimal value)\n    {\n        if (target == null)\n            return;\n\n        var prop = target.GetType().GetProperty(propertyName);\n        if (prop == null || !prop.CanWrite)\n            return;\n\n        if (prop.PropertyType == typeof(decimal) || prop.PropertyType == typeof(decimal?))\n            prop.SetValue(target, value);\n    }\n\n    private decimal GetDecimalProperty(object target, string propertyName)\n    {\n        if (target == null)\n            return 0m;\n\n        var prop = target.GetType().GetProperty(propertyName);\n        if (prop == null)\n            return 0m;\n\n        object value = prop.GetValue(target);\n        if (value is decimal dec)\n            return dec;\n\n        if (value is double dbl)\n            return (decimal)dbl;\n\n        if (value is float flt)\n            return (decimal)flt;\n\n        if (value != null && decimal.TryParse(value.ToString(), out decimal parsed))\n            return parsed;\n\n        return 0m;\n    }\n\n    private void SetBooleanProperty(object target, string propertyName, bool value)\n    {\n        if (target == null)\n            return;\n\n        var prop = target.GetType().GetProperty(propertyName);\n        if (prop == null || !prop.CanWrite)\n            return;\n\n        if (prop.PropertyType == typeof(bool) || prop.PropertyType == typeof(bool?))\n            prop.SetValue(target, value);\n    }\n\n    private bool IsPickupFallbackEnabled()\n    {\n        string raw = _businessRuleSettings?.FirstOrDefault(x => string.Equals(x.Key, \"PickupFallbackEnabled\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))?.Value;\n        return ParseBoolean(raw, false);\n    }\n\n    private Pickup BuildFallbackPickup(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n    {\n        var pickup = new Pickup();\n\n        if (shipmentRequest?.PackageDefaults?.Consignee != null)\n        {\n            pickup.NameAddress = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee;\n        }\n\n        return pickup;\n    }\n\n    private void AttachPickupToShipmentRequest(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, Pickup pickup)\n    {\n        if (shipmentRequest == null || pickup == null)\n            return;\n\n        var prop = shipmentRequest.GetType().GetProperty(\"Pickup\");\n        if (prop != null && prop.CanWrite)\n        {\n            prop.SetValue(shipmentRequest, pickup);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        prop = shipmentRequest.GetType().GetProperty(\"PickupRequest\");\n        if (prop != null && prop.CanWrite)\n        {\n            prop.SetValue(shipmentRequest, pickup);\n        }\n    }\n}\n"},{"file":"CreateBatchRequest.cs","fullContent":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Data;\nusing System.IO;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing System.Runtime.InteropServices;\nusing PSI.Sox.Interfaces;\n\nnamespace PSI.Sox\n{\n    public class CreateBatchRequest\n    {\n        Tools Tools;\n\n        public ILogger Logger { get; set; }\n\n        public CreateBatchRequest(ILogger logger)\n        {\n            Logger = logger;\n            Tools = new Tools(Logger);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Creates a FULL batch request with a list of batch items\n        /// </summary>\n        public BatchRequest GetBatchRequest(string batchReference, SerializableDictionary Params, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings, [Optional] Stream fileStream, ClientContext clientContext, string shipper)\n        {\n            Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"In GetBatchRequest...\");\n\n            string connectionString = string.Empty;\n            DataSet batchData = new DataSet();\n            DataService dataService = new DataService(Logger);\n            bool batchFile = false;\n            \n            if (fileStream != null)\n            {\n                batchFile = true;\n                batchData = dataService.ParseBatchFile(fileStream, DataService.BatchFileType.DELIMITED);\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"Batching From a File \" + batchReference);\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                connectionString = Tools.GetStringValueFromBusinessRuleSettings(\"customersdb\", BusinessRuleSettings);\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"Batching From Database \" + batchReference);\n            }\n\n            BatchRequest batchRequest = new BatchRequest();\n\n            if (batchData != null)\n            {\n                string userName = SplitUserFromEmailAddress(clientContext);\n\n                batchRequest.BatchReference = userName + \"_\" + DateTime.Now.ToString(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\") + \"_\" + batchReference;\n                batchRequest = GetBatchRequestItems(batchData, batchReference, batchRequest, Params, BusinessRuleSettings, batchFile, shipper);\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                batchRequest = null;\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"ERROR in GetBatchRequest the database returned null for \" + batchReference);\n            }\n\n            return batchRequest;\n        }\n\n        private BatchRequest GetBatchRequestItems(DataSet batchData, string batchReference, BatchRequest batchRequest, SerializableDictionary Params, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings, bool batchFile, string shipper)\n        {\n            if (batchRequest.BatchItems == null)\n            {\n                batchRequest.BatchItems = new List<BatchItem>();\n            }\n\n            for (int i = 0; i < batchData.Tables[0].Rows.Count; i++)\n            {\n                var batchItem = new BatchItem();\n\n                batchItem.BatchItemReference = batchReference + \"_\" + batchData.Tables[0].Rows[i][\"PackageSeq\"].ToString();\n                batchItem.SequenceNumber = i + 1;\n\n                batchItem.ShipmentRequest = GetShipmentRequest(batchData.Tables[0].Rows[i], batchReference, Params, BusinessRuleSettings, batchFile, shipper);\n\n                batchRequest.BatchItems.Add(batchItem);\n            }\n\n            return batchRequest;\n        }\n\n        public ShipmentRequest GetShipmentRequest(DataRow batchDataRow, string batchReference, SerializableDictionary Params, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings, bool batchFile, string shipper)\n        {\n            ShipmentRequest shipRequest = new ShipmentRequest();\n            shipRequest.PackageDefaults = new Package();\n\n            SetDefAttr(batchDataRow, shipRequest, Params, batchFile, batchReference, BusinessRuleSettings, shipper);\n            shipRequest = SetPackageData(batchDataRow, shipRequest, Params, batchReference, BusinessRuleSettings, batchFile);\n\n            return shipRequest;\n        }\n\n        private void SetDefAttr(DataRow batchDataRow, ShipmentRequest shipRequest, SerializableDictionary Params, bool batchFile, string batchReference, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings, string shipper)\n        {\n            shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = new Date(DateTime.Now);\n            SetShipper(shipRequest, shipper);\n            shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee = SetConsigneeData(batchDataRow);\n            shipRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress = SetShipFromData(batchDataRow);\n            SetServiceType(batchDataRow, shipRequest, Params, batchFile, batchReference);\n            SetBillingTerms(batchDataRow, shipRequest);\n        }\n\n        private void SetShipper(ShipmentRequest shipRequest, string shipper)\n        {\n            shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipper = shipper;\n        }\n\n        private NameAddress SetConsigneeData(DataRow batchDataRow)\n        {\n            NameAddress consignee = new NameAddress();\n            consignee.Company = batchDataRow[\"ShipToCompany\"].ToString();\n            consignee.Contact = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipToContact\"].ToString());\n            consignee.Address1 = batchDataRow[\"ShipToAddress1\"].ToString();\n            consignee.Address2 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipToAddress2\"].ToString());\n            consignee.Address3 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipToAddress3\"].ToString());\n            consignee.City = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipToCity\"].ToString());\n            consignee.StateProvince = batchDataRow[\"ShipToState\"].ToString();\n            consignee.PostalCode = batchDataRow[\"ShipToZipcode\"].ToString();\n            consignee.Country = batchDataRow[\"ShipToCountry\"].ToString();                              \n            consignee.Phone = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipToPhone\"].ToString());\n            return consignee;\n        }\n\n        private NameAddress SetShipFromData(DataRow batchDataRow)\n        {\n            NameAddress shipFromData = new NameAddress();         \n            shipFromData.Country = batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnCountry\"].ToString();\n            shipFromData.Company = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnCompany\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Contact = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnContact\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Address1 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnAddress1\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Address2 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnAddress2\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Address3 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnAddress3\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.City = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnCity\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.StateProvince = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnState\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.PostalCode = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnZipcode\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Phone = batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnPhone\"].ToString();\n            return shipFromData;\n        }\n\n        private NameAddress SetThirdPartyData(DataRow batchDataRow)\n        {\n            NameAddress thirdPartyBillingData = new NameAddress();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.Company = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.Address1 = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.Address2 = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.Address3 = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.City = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.StateProvince = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.PostalCode = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.Country = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.Phone = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            return thirdPartyBillingData;\n        }\n\n        private ShipmentRequest SetPackageData(DataRow batchDataRow, ShipmentRequest shipRequest, SerializableDictionary Params, string batchReference, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings, bool batchFile)\n        {\n            PackageRequest packageRequest = new PackageRequest();\n\n            SetDimensions(batchDataRow, packageRequest, Params, batchFile);\n            SetEmailNotification(batchDataRow, packageRequest);\n            SetPackageWeight(batchDataRow, packageRequest, Params, batchFile, batchReference);\n            SetReferenceFields(shipRequest, batchDataRow, Params, batchReference, packageRequest);\n            SetAccessorials(batchDataRow, packageRequest);\n\n            if (shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country != \"US\" && packageRequest.DocumentsOnly != true)\n            {\n                SetCommodityContents(shipRequest, packageRequest, batchDataRow, BusinessRuleSettings);\n            }\n\n            if (shipRequest.Packages == null)\n            {\n                shipRequest.Packages = new List<PackageRequest>();\n            }\n\n            shipRequest.Packages.Add(packageRequest);\n            return shipRequest;\n        }\n\n        private void SetPackageWeight(DataRow batchDataRow, PackageRequest packageRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams, bool batchFile, string batchReference)\n        {\n            packageRequest.Weight = Tools.ConvertToWeightObj(batchDataRow[\"PackageWeight\"].ToString().Trim());\n\n            if (packageRequest.Weight.Amount == 0)\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"Batch did not have a wieght greater than 0 for batch \" + batchReference);\n                throw new Exception(\"ERROR... You did not provide a WEIGHT for your batch \" + batchReference + \". Please provide a weight and try again.\");\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void SetAccessorials(DataRow batchDataRow, PackageRequest packageRequest)\n        {\n            packageRequest.Packaging = batchDataRow[\"Packaging\"].ToString();\n            packageRequest.Proof = Tools.ConvertToBool(batchDataRow[\"ProofRequireSignature\"].ToString());\n            packageRequest.ProofRequireSignature = Tools.ConvertToBool(batchDataRow[\"ProofRequireSignature\"].ToString());\n            packageRequest.SaturdayDelivery = Tools.ConvertToBool(batchDataRow[\"SaturdayDelivery\"].ToString());\n            packageRequest.DocumentsOnly = Tools.ConvertToBool(batchDataRow[\"DocumentsOnly\"].ToString());\n            packageRequest.Description = batchDataRow[\"Description\"].ToString();\n        }\n\n        private void SetCommodityContents(ShipmentRequest shipRequest, PackageRequest packageRequest, DataRow batchDataRow, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings)\n        {\n            for (int i = 1; i < 6; i++)\n            {\n                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(batchDataRow[\"Item\" + i + \"ProductCode\"].ToString()))\n                {\n                    CommodityContent commodities = new CommodityContent();\n                    commodities.ProductCode = batchDataRow[\"Item\" + i + \"ProductCode\"].ToString();\n                    commodities.Description = batchDataRow[\"Item\" + i + \"Description\"].ToString();\n                    commodities.OriginCountry = batchDataRow[\"Item\" + i + \"OriginCountry\"].ToString();\n                    commodities.Quantity = Tools.ConvertStringToLong(batchDataRow[\"Item\" + i + \"Quantity\"].ToString());\n                    commodities.UnitValue = Tools.ConvertToMoneyObj(batchDataRow[\"Item\" + i + \"UnitValue\"].ToString());\n                    commodities.UnitWeight = Tools.ConvertToWeightObj(batchDataRow[\"Item\" + i + \"UnitWeight\"].ToString());\n                    commodities.QuantityUnitMeasure = \"PCS\";\n\n                    if (packageRequest.CommodityContents == null)\n                    {\n                        packageRequest.CommodityContents = new List<CommodityContent>();\n                    }\n\n                    packageRequest.CommodityContents.Add(commodities);\n                }\n            }\n\n            if (packageRequest.CommodityContents == null)\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"ERROR... In SetCommodityContents no commodity data was found in the batch file for ship to address \" + batchDataRow[\"ShipToAddress1\"].ToString());\n            }   \n        }\n\n        private void SetDimensions(DataRow batchDataRow, PackageRequest packageRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams, bool batchFile)\n        {\n            Dimensions dimensions = new Dimensions();\n            dimensions.Length = Tools.ConvertStringToDouble(batchDataRow[\"Length\"].ToString());\n            dimensions.Width = Tools.ConvertStringToDouble(batchDataRow[\"Width\"].ToString());\n            dimensions.Height = Tools.ConvertStringToDouble(batchDataRow[\"Height\"].ToString());\n            packageRequest.Dimensions = dimensions;\n        }\n\n        private void SetReferenceFields(ShipmentRequest shipRequest, DataRow batchDataRow, SerializableDictionary Params, string batchReference, PackageRequest packageRequest)\n        {\n            packageRequest.ShipperReference = batchDataRow[\"ShipperReference\"].ToString();\n            packageRequest.ConsigneeReference = batchDataRow[\"ConsigneeReference\"].ToString();\n        }\n\n        private void SetUserData(PackageRequest pack, DataRow batchDataRow, SerializableDictionary Params, string batchReference, bool batchFile)\n        {\n        }\n\n        private void SetEmailNotification(DataRow batchDataRow, PackageRequest packageRequest)\n        {\n            if (Tools.IsEmailFormatValid(batchDataRow[\"EmailAddress\"].ToString()))\n            {\n                packageRequest.ShipNotificationEmail = true;\n                packageRequest.ShipNotificationAddressEmail = batchDataRow[\"EmailAddress\"].ToString();              \n            }\n        }\n\n        private void SetServiceType(DataRow batchDataRow, ShipmentRequest shipRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams, bool batchFile, string batchReference)\n        {\n            if (batchFile)\n            {\n                string serviceType = string.Empty;  \n\n                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(serviceType))\n                {\n                    shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = Tools.TranslateServiceType(serviceType);\n                }\n                else\n                {\n                    Service service = new Service\n                    {\n                        Symbol = batchDataRow[\"Service\"].ToString()\n                    };\n\n                    shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = service;\n                }\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                Service service = new Service\n                {\n                    Symbol = batchDataRow[\"Service\"].ToString()\n                };\n\n                shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = service;\n            }\n\n            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol))\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"Batch record did not have a Service Type for batch \" + batchReference);\n                throw new Exception(\"ERROR... You did not provide a Carrier Service Type for batch \" + batchReference + \" please try again.\");\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void SetBillingTerms(DataRow batchDataRow, ShipmentRequest shipRequest)\n        {\n            shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Terms = \"SHIPPER\";\n        }\n\n        private string SplitUserFromEmailAddress(ClientContext clientContext)\n        {\n            string userName = string.Empty;\n            \n            if (clientContext != null)\n            {\n                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(clientContext.User.UserName))\n                {\n                    if (clientContext.User.UserName.Contains('@'))\n                    {\n                        return clientContext.User.UserName.Split('@')[0];\n                    }\n                    else\n                    {\n                        Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Warning, \"Warning In SplitUserFromEmailAddress ClientContext username did not contain an @ and could not be parsed.\");\n                    }\n                }\n                else\n                {\n                    Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"Error In SplitUserFromEmailAddress clientContext user name was null or empty. Could not get the user name.\");\n                }\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"Error In SplitUserFromEmailAddress could not parse email address as the ClientContext was null.\");\n            }\n\n            return userName;\n        }\n    }\n}\n"},{"file":"LoadShipment.cs","fullContent":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing System.Text;\nusing System.Data;\nusing PSI.Sox.Interfaces;\n\nnamespace PSI.Sox\n{\n    public class LoadShipment\n    {\n        Tools Tools;\n\n        public ILogger Logger { get; set; }\n\n        public LoadShipment(ILogger logger)\n        {\n            Logger = logger;\n            Tools = new Tools(Logger);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Entry point to create a FULL ShipmentRequest\n        /// </summary>\n        public ShipmentRequest GetShipmentRequest(string keyNumber,ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings)\n        {\n            Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"In GetShipmentRequest.\");\n\n            string connectionString = Tools.GetStringValueFromBusinessRuleSettings(\"customersdb\", BusinessRuleSettings);\n\n            DataService dataService = new DataService(Logger);\n            \n            DataSet orderData = dataService.GetDataByKeyNumber(connectionString, keyNumber, DataService.DataSetName.HEADER);\n\n            if (orderData == null)\n            {        \n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"No record(s) found for '\" + keyNumber + \"' DataSet[\" + DataService.DataSetName.HEADER + \"]\");\n                throw new Exception(\"No record(s) found for '\" + keyNumber + \"' DataSet[\" + DataService.DataSetName.HEADER + \"]\");\n            }\n\n            DataSet commodities = dataService.GetDataByKeyNumber(connectionString, keyNumber, DataService.DataSetName.COMMODITY);\n\n            if(commodities == null)\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"No record(s) found for '\" + keyNumber + \"' DataSet[\" + DataService.DataSetName.COMMODITY + \"]\");\n                throw new Exception(\"No record(s) found for '\" + keyNumber + \"' DataSet[\" + DataService.DataSetName.COMMODITY + \"]\");\n            }\n\n            DataSet packagesDataSet = new DataSet();\n            int packageIndex = 0;\n\n            if (orderData != null)\n            {\n                shipmentRequest = SetPackageDefaults(orderData, shipmentRequest, keyNumber);\n                shipmentRequest = SetPackageData(orderData, packagesDataSet, commodities, shipmentRequest, userParams, keyNumber, packageIndex);\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                shipmentRequest = null;\n            }\n\n            return shipmentRequest;\n        }\n\n        private ShipmentRequest SetPackageDefaults(DataSet orderData, ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, string keyNumber)\n        {\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee = SetConsigneeData(orderData);\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = SetServiceType(orderData);\n            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Terms = SetBillingTerms(orderData, shipmentRequest);\n            return shipmentRequest;\n        }\n\n        private NameAddress SetConsigneeData(DataSet orderData)\n        {\n            NameAddress consignee = new NameAddress();\n            consignee.Country = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_country_symbol\"].ToString();\n            consignee.Company = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_company\"].ToString();\n            consignee.Contact = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_contact\"].ToString());\n            consignee.Address1 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_address1\"].ToString());\n            consignee.Address2 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_address2\"].ToString());\n            consignee.Address3 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_address3\"].ToString());\n            consignee.City = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_city\"].ToString());\n            consignee.StateProvince = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_state_province\"].ToString());\n            consignee.PostalCode = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_postal_code\"].ToString());\n            consignee.Phone = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"consignee_phone\"].ToString());\n            return consignee;\n        }\n\n        private NameAddress SetShipFromData(DataSet orderData)\n        {\n            NameAddress shipFromData = new NameAddress();\n            shipFromData.Country = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_country_symbol\"].ToString();\n            shipFromData.Company = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_company\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Contact = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_contact\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Address1 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_address1\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Address2 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_address2\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Address3 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_address3\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.City = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_city\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.StateProvince = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_state_province\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.PostalCode = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_postal_code\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Phone = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"return_address_phone\"].ToString();\n            return shipFromData;\n        }\n\n        private ShipmentRequest SetThirdPartyData(DataSet orderData, ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest)\n        {\n            NameAddress thirdPartyBillingData = new NameAddress();\n\n            bool thirdPartyFlag = (bool)orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_billing\"];\n\n            if (thirdPartyFlag)\n            {\n                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling = true;\n                thirdPartyBillingData.Account = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_account\"].ToString();\n                thirdPartyBillingData.Country = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_country_symbol\"].ToString();\n                thirdPartyBillingData.Company = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_company\"].ToString());\n                thirdPartyBillingData.Address1 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_address1\"].ToString());\n                thirdPartyBillingData.Address2 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_address2\"].ToString());\n                thirdPartyBillingData.Address3 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_address3\"].ToString());\n                thirdPartyBillingData.City = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_city\"].ToString());\n                thirdPartyBillingData.StateProvince = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_state_province\"].ToString());\n                thirdPartyBillingData.PostalCode = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_postal_code\"].ToString());\n                thirdPartyBillingData.Phone = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"third_party_address_phone\"].ToString());\n                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress = thirdPartyBillingData;\n            }\n            \n            return shipmentRequest;\n        }\n\n        private NameAddress SetImporterOfRecord(DataSet orderData)\n        {\n            NameAddress importOfRecord = new NameAddress();\n            importOfRecord.Country = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_country_symbol\"].ToString();\n            importOfRecord.Company = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_company\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.Contact = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_contact\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.Address1 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_address1\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.Address2 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_address2\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.Address3 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_address3\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.City = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_city\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.StateProvince = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_state_province\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.PostalCode = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_postal_code\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.Phone = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"importer_of_record_phone\"].ToString());\n            importOfRecord.Account = orderData.Tables[0].Rows[0][\"ImporterOfRecordAccount\"].ToString();\n            return importOfRecord;\n        }\n\n        private ShipmentRequest SetPackageData(DataSet orderData, DataSet packagesDataSet,DataSet commodities, ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary Params, string keyNumber, int packageIndex)\n        {\n            shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex] = SetPackageReferenceFields(orderData, packagesDataSet, keyNumber, shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex]);\n            shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex] = SetPackageEmailNotification(orderData, shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex]);\n            shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex] = SetPackageAccessorials(orderData, packagesDataSet, shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex]);\n            shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex] = SetPackageUserData(shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex], orderData, packagesDataSet, keyNumber);\n            shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex] = SetPackageDimensions(orderData, shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex]);\n\n            if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country != \"US\")\n            {\n                shipmentRequest = SetCommodityContents(shipmentRequest, orderData, packagesDataSet, commodities, packageIndex);\n            }\n\n            return shipmentRequest;\n        }\n\n        private PackageRequest SetPackageAccessorials(DataSet orderData, DataSet packagesDataSet, PackageRequest packageRequest)\n        {\n            packageRequest.Packaging = \"CUSTOM\";\n            return packageRequest;\n        }\n\n        private ShipmentRequest SetCommodityContents(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, DataSet orderData,DataSet packagesDataSet, DataSet commodities, int packageIndex)\n        {\n            if (commodities.Tables.Count > 0)\n            {\n                if (commodities.Tables[0].Rows.Count > 0)\n                {\n                    for (int i = 0; i < commodities.Tables[0].Rows.Count; i++)\n                    {\n                        CommodityContent commodity = new CommodityContent();\n                        commodity.OriginCountry = commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i][\"commodity_origin_country\"].ToString();\n                        commodity.Description = commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i][\"commodity_description\"].ToString();\n                        commodity.ProductCode = commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i][\"commodity_product_code\"].ToString();\n                        commodity.QuantityUnitMeasure = \"PCS\";\n                        commodity.UnitWeight = Tools.ConvertToWeightObj(commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i][\"commodity_unit_weight\"].ToString());\n                        commodity.UnitValue = Tools.ConvertToMoneyObj(commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i][\"commodity_unit_value\"].ToString());\n                        commodity.Quantity = Tools.ConvertStringToLong(commodities.Tables[0].Rows[i][\"commodity_quantity\"].ToString());\n\n                        if (shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].CommodityContents == null)\n                        {\n                            shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].CommodityContents = new List<CommodityContent>();\n                        }\n\n                        shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].CommodityContents.Add(commodity);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            return shipmentRequest;\n        }\n\n        private PackageRequest SetPackageReferenceFields(DataSet orderData, DataSet packagesDataSet, string keyNumber, PackageRequest packageRequest)\n        {\n            packageRequest.ShipperReference =
